title: Candle Flame as Three-Stratum System

analysis.object: T596: Candle Flame as Three-Stratum System depth analysis

combustion_eml1.description: Chemical combustion: EML-1 exponential oxidation chain
combustion_eml1.reason: Candle reaction is EML-1: exponential radical chain reaction sustaining the flame

shape_eml2.reason: Teardrop shape is EML-2: Laplace equation balance of buoyancy vs diffusion forces

microgravity_pure_eml2.description: In microgravity: spherical flame reveals pure EML-2 diffusion without EML-1 buoyancy
microgravity_pure_eml2.reason: Microgravity candle: EML-1 removed; pure EML-2 sphere; space reveals the depth

flicker_eml3.description: Flame flicker: EML-3 oscillatory; draft-driven frequency ~ 10-12 Hz
flicker_eml3.reason: Candle flicker is EML-3: oscillatory combustion instability driven by convective coupling

analysis.theorem: T596: Candle Flame as Three-Stratum System (S875).

key_theorem: T596: Candle Flame as Three-Stratum System (S875).
